aboutPreview.lead: We support children, young people, and clubs with a clear training approach that combines athletic development, enjoyment of the game, and a positive learning environment.
aboutPreview.point1Text: Clear content, modern training organization, and easy-to-understand processes.
aboutPreview.point2Text: Support tailored to age, level, and development.
aboutPreview.mediaCaption: Insights into our work with children, young people, and clubs.

hero.title: Build football skills. Strengthen children.
hero.lead: Modern training programs for camps, development training, kindergarten and individual training – with clear structure, joy of the game and personal growth.

values.title: What defines us
values.card2Text: We work with structure and quality.
values.card3Text: We strengthen children in sport and life.

intro.lead: The franchise model of Dortmund Football School gives you the opportunity to combine your passion for football with a profitable business concept built on practical experience and a clear football philosophy.
intro.point1Text: Structured concept with a strong base for sustainable growth.
intro.point2Text: Training know-how, marketing support and ongoing guidance.
intro.mediaCaption: Discover how our concept combines football know-how, structure and long-term partnership.
